markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new hires to GrowthX tools, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding is managed in Linear:** All tasks are tracked in a personal project, with links to the corresponding Notion resources.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [**Daily stand-ups are mandatory:** Use Geekbot in Slack for asynchronous updates on progress, blockers, and questions.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**The `team@growthxlabs.com` email is for shared tools:** This account is used for access to platforms like ChatGPT and for client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Key policies:** Unlimited PTO (requires calendar block), a referral program (up to $10k bonus), and a 4-hour minimum overlap with Pacific Time.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [**Leonardo Carpenedo Steffen (Tech Lead):** 20+ years in software (QA, dev, tech lead); supports the CTO.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Kathy Lam (Account Director):** 90-day focus on the Strategy Sprint team; background in PM, PMM, and growth marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Carly Piekos (Engagement Manager):** Background in SEO, marketing, and customer success (agency, Conductor).](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Andrew Bishara (Managing Editor):** 10+ years in content (agencies, internal teams, AI).](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Pamela (Content Lead):** Joins from Inc. and AI, an AI SaaS company.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### GrowthX Tools & Platforms

  - [**Slack:** Primary communication hub.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [**Channel Naming:** `D` (Delivery/client-facing) or `B` (Build/internal ops) + `Int` (Internal) or `Ext` (External) + Client Name.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Geekbot:** Asynchronous stand-ups in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [**Process:** Prompts arrive daily; respond during your shift.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Share progress, blockers, and questions with your team.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [**Note:** Geekbot is pre-integrated; no installation is required.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [**Linear:** Project management tool.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Use:** Track personal onboarding tasks and assign tickets to IT/engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Notion:** Central knowledge base for documentation, SOPs, and client files.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Other Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Loom:** Screen recording](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Zoom:** Meetings](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Fathom:** AI note-taker](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Onboarding Process & Resources

  - [**Onboarding Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Location:** Notion → Handbook → Onboarding Resources → Company-Wide Onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Structure:** Day 1 tasks (tool setup) and Week 1 tasks (reading, webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Task Management in Linear:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Location:** `Workspace` → `Projects` → `My Projects` → Your Onboarding Project.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Process:** Each task links to its Notion resource. Update task status (`In Progress`, `Done`) in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Key Policies & Information

  - [**Time Off (PTO):**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [**Policy:** Unlimited PTO; no approval required.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**Process:** Block time on the calendar and invite your team.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**Notice:** Provide 1–2 weeks' notice.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Employee Referral Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Bonus:** Up to $10k for engineering roles; up to $5k for non-engineering roles.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Condition:** Referral must remain employed for 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**IT & Tool Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - **Channel:** `#it-and-tools` in Slack.
      - [**Contacts:** Alice Ochieng or Yusuf (Head of Cybersecurity & IT).](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [**Bi-weekly All-Hands:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**Next Meeting:** Next week.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**Action:** New hires will introduce themselves (name, location, fun fact).](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [**Onboarding Buddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
      - [**Assignment:** Your manager will assign a buddy to help you learn processes and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

### Team Email Setup (`team@growthxlabs.com`)

  - [**Purpose:** Shared access for tools (e.g., ChatGPT) and client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Setup Process (in Gmail):**](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
    1.  [Add account using credentials from 1Password.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
    2.  [When prompted for 2FA, select "Try another way."](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
    3.  [Choose "Get a verification code from the Google Authenticator app."](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
    4.  [Copy the one-time password (OTP) from 1Password and paste it.](https://fathom.video/share/p8q7UHavWByssaoSx7zbhNBnm8o5ak35?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)

## Next Steps
